Cut: shorts/short_cutter_v2.py with hook/outro cards — added a 'source_is_portrait' config option (skips the landscape-crop assumption for freshly-rendered portrait sources) and a 'hook_fontsize' override (default 220 overflowed the 4-line hook text; used 150), both additive/backward-compatible. Thumb: shorts/make_fern_thumb.py — fixed a broken hardcoded font path (pointed at a different host's filesystem, OSError in this container) to use an available system Liberation Sans Bold. NOT uploaded: no working camoufox-stealth MCP tool available in this session/sandbox to reach YouTube Studio. mp4 (19MB) and thumbnail are local-only production artifacts, not committed to git per repo convention (no binary renders in git history) — state, config, script text, and metadata committed instead. See LEARNINGS.md BLOCKER_2026-07-04 for manual-recovery / next-session instructions.
